name: show_api_key
description: Return the bearer token from the Authorization header of the MCP settings, which is used to debug.

name: primer
description: Get up-to-date contextual information of the current session to provide localized, time-aware responses.

name: guess_datetime_url
description: Guess the last updated or published datetime of a web page. This tool examines HTTP headers, HTML metadata, Schema.org data, visible dates, JavaScript timestamps, HTML comments, Git information, RSS/Atom feeds, sitemaps, and international date formats to provide the most accurate update time with confidence scores.

url.description: The complete HTTP/HTTPS URL of the webpage to guess datetime information

name: capture_screenshot_url
description: Capture high-quality screenshots of web pages in base64 encoded JPEG format.

name: read_url
description: Extract and convert web page content to clean, readable markdown format. Perfect for reading articles, documentation, blog posts, or any web content.

url.description: The complete URL of the webpage or PDF file to read and convert. Can be a single URL string or an array of URLs for parallel reading.

name: search_web
description: Search the entire web for current information, news, articles, and websites. Ideal for answering questions about recent events, finding resources, or discovering relevant content.

query.description: Search terms or keywords to find relevant web content.

name: expand_query
description: Expand and rewrite search queries based on an up-to-date query expansion model.

name: search_arxiv
description: Search academic papers and preprints on arXiv repository.

query.description: Academic search terms, author names, or research topics.

name: search_ssrn
description: Search academic papers and preprints on SSRN (Social Science Research Network).

query.description: Academic search terms, author names, or research topics.

name: search_jina_blog
description: Search Jina AI news and blog posts at jina.ai/news for articles about AI, machine learning, neural search, embeddings, and Jina products.

query.description: Search terms to find relevant Jina blog posts.

name: search_images
description: Search for images across the web, similar to Google Images.

name: parallel_search_web
description: Run multiple web searches in parallel for comprehensive topic coverage and diverse perspectives.

searches.description: Array of search configurations to execute in parallel (maximum 5)

name: parallel_search_arxiv
description: Run multiple arXiv searches in parallel for comprehensive research coverage.

name: parallel_search_ssrn
description: Run multiple SSRN searches in parallel for comprehensive social science research coverage.

name: parallel_read_url
description: Read multiple web pages in parallel to extract clean content efficiently.

urls.description: Array of URL configurations to read in parallel

name: classify_text
description: Classify texts into user-defined labels using Jina embeddings.

texts.description: Array of text strings to classify

name: sort_by_relevance
description: Rerank a list of documents by relevance to a query using Jina Reranker API.

query.description: The query or topic to rank documents against

documents.description: Array of document texts to rerank

name: deduplicate_strings
description: Get top-k semantically unique strings from a list using Jina embeddings and submodular optimization.

k.description: Number of unique strings to return. If not provided, automatically finds optimal k.

name: deduplicate_images
description: Get top-k semantically unique images using Jina CLIP v2 embeddings and submodular optimization.

images.description: Array of image inputs (URLs or base64) to deduplicate.

name: search_bibtex
description: Search for academic papers and return BibTeX citations from DBLP and Semantic Scholar.

query.description: Search query - paper title, topic, or keywords

name: extract_pdf
description: Extract figures, tables, and equations from PDF documents using layout detection.

id.description: arXiv paper ID. Either id or url is required.

url.description: Direct PDF URL. Either id or url is required.
